highlights.name: prx
highlights.description: The agent-run work-unit CLI: capability-scoped agents whose privileged effects are verified against a signed owner, driving a work unit through one signed pipeline to a merged PR.

highlights.name: guest-room
highlights.description: Guest-agnostic room+door capability runtime — the core library claude-box is built on.

highlights.name: claude-box
highlights.description: A capability-secured box for agent sessions — its authority is the door references it holds (keeper/scout/concierge/net), parent-agnostic.

highlights.name: door-kit
highlights.description: In-box door-client SDK for claude-box's capability doors (keeper/scout/concierge/spawn), over the guest-room protocol

highlights.name: ocap-provenance
highlights.description: Capability-use provenance — a schema + SLSA mapping binding each privileged effect to a signed owner and an auditable chain.

highlights.name: string-audit
highlights.description: Cost-aware, grounded content auditor — typed string symbols, type-scoped audits, CAS-memoized LLM calls.

items.name: superpowers
items.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

items.name: react
items.description: The library for web and native user interfaces.

items.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
items.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

items.name: opencode
items.description: The open source coding agent.

items.name: claude-code
items.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

items.name: gstack
items.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

items.name: spec-kit
items.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development

items.name: gemini-cli
items.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

items.name: codex
items.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal

items.name: claude-mem
items.description: Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent –  Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More

items.name: OpenHands
items.description: 🙌 OpenHands: AI-Driven Development

items.name: Understand-Anything
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

items.name: ansible
items.description: Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.

items.name: pi
items.description: AI agent toolkit: unified LLM API, agent loop, TUI, coding agent CLI

items.name: get-shit-done
items.description: A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code by TÂCHES.

items.name: rustlings
items.description: :crab: Small exercises to get you used to reading and writing Rust code!

items.name: warp
items.description: Warp is an agentic development environment, born out of the terminal.

items.name: git
items.description: Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

items.name: taste-skill
items.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

items.name: OpenSpec
items.description: Spec-driven development (SDD) for AI coding assistants.

items.name: codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph, auto syncs on code changes, for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

items.name: crewAI
items.description: Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. By fostering collaborative intelligence, CrewAI empowers agents to work together seamlessly, tackling complex tasks.

items.name: litellm
items.description: Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]

items.name: goose
items.description: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

items.name: expo
items.description: An open-source framework for making universal native apps with React. Expo runs on Android, iOS, and the web.

items.name: container
items.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

items.name: claude-cookbooks
items.description: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

items.name: agno
items.description: Build, run, and manage agent platforms.

items.name: LibreChat
items.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, MCP, Skills, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Responses API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-5, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active

items.name: ink
items.description: 🌈 React for interactive command-line apps
